_provenance: compound 1 SMILES from RCSB 8G1Q; compound 4 = defined linker ring N->CH (pyridine->benzene) of compound 1; alpha values are same-paper SPR (reviewer-supplied).
reviewer_approval: valB_mini per reviewer 2026-07-17 Option-1 conditional GO (Wurz 1->4 replaces the retired PROTAC 2->cis epimer edge).

citation_8g1q.title: Affinity and cooperativity modulate ternary complex formation to drive targeted protein degradation.

calib_lo.name: Wurz_cmpd4
calib_lo.note: DERIVED (no separate crystal); the 5-part smoke gate re-checks built-vs-frozen identity and that this is a genuine N->CH element edge, not identity/stereo-only.

morph: Wurz_cmpd1 -> Wurz_cmpd4 (pyridine linker -> benzene linker; ring N -> CH)

target_bromodomain.note: 8G1Q resolves SMARCA4 BD; the SMARCA2 model is built by sequence substitution + relaxation.

starting_model.construct_note: 8G1Q is a 3.73 A SMARCA4-compound1-VHL structure. Build the SMARCA2 model by substituting the SMARCA4 BD sequence with the experimental SMARCA2 BD (P51531) and relaxing; the original investigators did the same (SMARCA2 crystallization failed).
starting_model.divergence_rule: Keep >=2 independently relaxed starting models; if they yield materially different binding modes BEFORE production, STOP - the benchmark is not diagnostically clean.
starting_model.limitation: SMARCA4-derived SMARCA2 starting model (homology substitution + relaxation), 3.73 A parent resolution - recorded as an explicit valB_mini limitation.

decision_rule_valB_mini._governing: Reviewer condition 6, 2026-07-19 (conditional-approval revisions). SUPERSEDES the earlier zero-exclusion-only rule; implemented as ternary_fep_reduce.calibration_gate (three-tier). Uses the BETWEEN-REPLICATE cycle SD (condition 3), NOT the MBAR SE.
decision_rule_valB_mini.quantity: ddG_coop = ddG_alch,ternary - ddG_alch,binary = -RT ln(alpha_4/alpha_1); target +0.944 kcal/mol (POSITIVE for the hi->lo morph).
PASS_requires_ALL: all convergence diagnostics pass (overlap CONNECTED/no bottleneck, dG(t) plateau, replica mixing, fwd/rev agree <=1.0, stable ligand/interface RMSD)
|mean ddG_calc - target| <= 1.0 kcal/mol (FIXED accuracy margin, not 'within replicate SD')
BORDERLINE_extend_to_5: a would-be PASS within 0.5 kcal/mol of a pass/fail boundary, one replicate separated, or different interface states (condition 3)
FAIL: cycle SD > 1.0 kcal/mol AFTER extension to >=5 replicates
persistent overlap / drift / structural convergence failure
decision_rule_valB_mini.replicate_design: condition 3: >=3 independent complete-cycle replicates (different seeds AND velocities, preferably decorrelated PE snapshots); report mean + sample SD + t/bootstrap CI; do NOT substitute the single-run MBAR SE for between-replicate uncertainty; extend to 5 on the BORDERLINE triggers.
decision_rule_valB_mini.interpretation_scope: condition 7: a PASS validates plumbing / endpoint-stability / cycle-algebra / uncertainty / ONE known-answer only; it authorizes the NR-V04 retrospective ONLY. The prospective matrix stays blocked until NR-V04's own preregistered criteria pass.
decision_rule_valB_mini.retired_rule: The former +-1.0-band-ALONE rule and the interim zero-exclusion-only rule are both superseded by condition 6: a fixed +-1.0 margin is now COMBINED with correct sign + cycle SD <= 0.75 + all diagnostics, so it cannot accept zero or a diverging replicate set.

validation.note: a genuine ring N->CH edge is NOT the epimer null-map failure mode: differ_ignoring_stereo=True and one N is replaced by one C, so the hybrid topology carries a real element perturbation.
